message: feat: prefer giphy when key set

files.patch:
@@ -20,12 +20,12 @@ gifgrep --tui "office handshake"
 ## GIF providers
 gifgrep supports multiple backends via `--source`:
 
-### Tenor (default)
-- Default provider (`--source tenor`)
+### Tenor (fallback)
+- Used when no `GIPHY_API_KEY` is set (`--source tenor`)
 - `TENOR_API_KEY` is optional; if unset, gifgrep uses Tenor’s public demo key.
 
-### Giphy
-- Use via `--source giphy`
+### Giphy (preferred)
+- Preferred when `GIPHY_API_KEY` is set (`--source giphy`)
 - Requires `GIPHY_API_KEY` (no fallback).
 
 Create a GIPHY key:
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@ gifgrep --tui [flags] <query>
 --mood <s>    mood filter
 --json        json output
 --tui         interactive mode
---source <s>  source (tenor)
+--source <s>  source (auto, tenor, giphy)
 --version     show version
 ```
 
@@ -73,7 +73,7 @@ gifgrep --tui [flags] <query>
 
 ## Environment variables
 - `TENOR_API_KEY` (optional): defaults to Tenor’s public demo key if unset
-- `GIPHY_API_KEY` (required for `--source giphy`)
+- `GIPHY_API_KEY` (optional): if set, gifgrep defaults to Giphy (`--source auto`)
 - `GIFGREP_SOFTWARE_ANIM=1` (optional): force software animation (auto-detects Ghostty)
 - `GIFGREP_CELL_ASPECT=0.5` (optional): tweak preview sizing for your terminal’s cell geometry

@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@
-
CLI / TUI · Tenor · kitty graphics
+
CLI / TUI · GIPHY (preferred) · Tenor · kitty graphics

🧲 gifgrep

Grep the GIF. Stick the landing. Scriptable URLs/JSON by default, plus a TUI that previews @@ -37,8 +37,8 @@

🧲 gifgrep

--tui for arrow-key browsing

- Needs a Tenor API key? Optional. Set TENOR_API_KEY or it falls back to Tenor’s public demo key. - Inline previews need Kitty or Ghostty. + If GIPHY_API_KEY is set, gifgrep prefers GIPHY. Otherwise it uses Tenor (with an optional + TENOR_API_KEY or Tenor’s public demo key). Inline previews need Kitty or Ghostty.

@@ -125,9 +125,13 @@

Source / code

github.com/steipete/gifgrep + + + GIPHY + Tenor
-
© Peter Steinberger · MIT · GIFs courtesy Tenor
+
© Peter Steinberger · MIT · GIFs courtesy GIPHY + Tenor

@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ func parseArgs(args []string) (model.Options, string, error) {
 	fs.BoolVar(&opts.Regex, "E", false, "regex search")
 	fs.BoolVar(&opts.Number, "n", false, "number results")
 	fs.IntVar(&opts.Limit, "m", 20, "max results")
-	fs.StringVar(&opts.Source, "source", "tenor", "source: tenor|giphy")
+	fs.StringVar(&opts.Source, "source", "auto", "source: auto|tenor|giphy")
 	fs.StringVar(&opts.Mood, "mood", "", "mood filter")
 	fs.StringVar(&opts.Color, "color", "auto", "color: auto|always|never")
 
@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@ func printUsage(w io.Writer) {
 	_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(w, "  --mood <s>    mood filter")
 	_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(w, "  --json        json output")
 	_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(w, "  --tui         interactive mode")
-	_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(w, "  --source <s>  source (tenor, giphy)")
+	_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(w, "  --source <s>  source (auto, tenor, giphy)")
 	_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(w, "  --version     show version")
 	_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(w, "  -h, --help    show help")
 }
